description: Drive Claude Code from your phone — the cc-pocket daemon.
post_install: try { & "$dir\cc-pocket-daemon.exe" service-install --apply | Write-Host } catch { Write-Host "service-install skipped (you can run it by hand): $_" }
notes: The daemon now runs in the background (a logon Scheduled Task was registered).
Requires the Claude Code CLI on PATH or at ~\.local\bin\claude.exe — the daemon drives it.
